text.title: Strategy Analysis — Change Strategy — Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Are current + future state specs current and is the decision-maker identifiable?

conclusion.verdict: block — author current and future state specs first

branch.when: specs_current AND decision_maker_named == true AND options_drafted < 2

example.trace: ENG-42 → specs current → decision_maker=CTO → 2 options → Databricks recommended
